backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the FRIDAY backend with user profile management, paginated conversation history, message storage, and user preferences, all protected by role-based access control via authorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (JARVIS UI theme, chat interface, voice interaction) to their corresponding source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries for key frontend source files including hooks, components, and the root App component.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including background, foreground, accent, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the FRIDAY React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that gates rendering behind Internet Identity authentication, handles profile loading state, shows a profile setup modal for new users, and renders the main Layout.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Presentational component displaying FRIDAY's version, supported languages, and a grid of capability badges with icons inside the settings sidebar.
frontend/src/components/AnimatedOrb.tsx: Animated orb component with rotating rings, radial gradient core, avatar image, and speaking bar overlay that changes appearance based on active and speaking states.
Renders an animated bar-wave audio visualizer with configurable bar count that is only visible when the isActive prop is true.
frontend/src/components/ChatInput.tsx: Chat input component with a textarea, speech recognition toggle, voice/wake-word detection, and a command palette trigger that fires on '/' input.
frontend/src/components/ChatMessage.tsx: Renders a single chat message bubble for either the user or FRIDAY, including intent badges and specialized sub-cards for code, email, and search responses.
frontend/src/components/ChatWindow.tsx: Scrollable chat window that renders the message list, a loading skeleton, an empty state, a thinking animation, and an audio visualizer when FRIDAY is speaking.
frontend/src/components/CodeBlock.tsx: Displays syntax-highlighted code with a language label and a one-click copy-to-clipboard button using basic regex-based highlighting.
frontend/src/components/CommandPalette.t: Floating command palette that shows a grid of predefined command templates with icons, closing on Escape or outside click.
frontend/src/components/EmailDraftCard.t: Card component that displays a formatted email draft (to, subject, body) with a copy-to-clipboard button.
frontend/src/components/IntentBadge.tsx: Small colored badge that displays a human-readable label for a detected intent category using a predefined color map.
frontend/src/components/LanguageBadge.ts: Compact display badge showing the current language code and flag emoji for English, Telugu, or Hindi.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector: Dropdown selector for choosing between English, Telugu, and Hindi using a shadcn Select component.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component that orchestrates the chat UI, settings sidebar, voice synthesis, wake word detection, and persists user preferences (language, voice settings) via React Query hooks.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Login screen component that handles Internet Identity authentication, displaying a styled landing page with feature badges and a login/logout button.
frontend/src/components/PrincipalDisplay: Small display component that shows a truncated Internet Identity principal string with a clipboard copy button.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog shown on first login that prompts the user to enter their name and saves it as a user profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/SearchResultCard: Card component that renders web search results with a query header, and a list of titled, snippeted, and sourced result entries.
Slide-in settings panel providing controls for user profile, language selection, voice settings, history clearing, logout, and an about section.
frontend/src/components/ThinkingAnimatio: Animated component displaying three bouncing dots inside a chat bubble to indicate the AI assistant is processing a response.
frontend/src/components/UserNameInput.ts: Inline editable input for the user's display name that auto-saves on blur or Enter key press and shows saving/saved status indicators.
frontend/src/components/VoiceControls.ts: React component that renders a toggle switch to enable/disable voice output and, when enabled, sliders to control speech speed and pitch.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useChat.ts: Custom hook managing chat state, including sending messages, parsing intent, generating FRIDAY responses, persisting messages to the backend, and loading conversation history.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, handling AuthClient creation, login, logout, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useLanguage.ts: Custom hook that manages the selected UI language (English, Telugu, Hindi) with localStorage persistence and a translation lookup helper.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations: fetching/saving user profiles, conversation history, messages, preferences, and clearing history.
Custom hook wrapping the Web Speech API to provide start/stop speech recognition with transcript state, error handling, and multi-language support.
frontend/src/hooks/useSpeechSynthesis.ts: Custom hook wrapping the Web Speech Synthesis API to speak text with configurable language, speed, and pitch, and track speaking state.
frontend/src/hooks/useWakeWord.ts: Custom hook that detects wake-word phrases (e.g., 'Hey FRIDAY') in a text string using regex patterns and manages an active/inactive state.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Defines TypeScript types and translation strings for three languages (English, Telugu, Hindi) covering all UI text used throughout the FRIDAY assistant app.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind, imports sci-fi fonts (Orbitron, Rajdhani, Share Tech Mono), and defines a dark gold-themed HUD design system with custom CSS variables, utility classes, and keyframe animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/commandTemplates.ts: Defines a list of predefined command templates (e.g., Search Web, Write Email, Write Code) with labels, icons, prompt templates, and category tags for the command palette feature.
frontend/src/utils/intentParser.ts: Parses user input text into categorized intents (e.g., WEB_SEARCH, SYSTEM_CONTROL, JOKE) using regex patterns and keyword matching, returning a category, confidence score, and matched keywords.
frontend/src/utils/responseGenerator.ts: Generates mock AI responses based on parsed intent categories, including code samples in multiple languages, system action descriptions, jokes, and other response types.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to clean sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the FRIDAY frontend, extending the theme with custom fonts (Orbitron, Rajdhani, Share Tech Mono), OKLCH-based color tokens including a 'friday' palette of gold and dark surface colors, gold glow box shadows, and accordion keyframe animations. Includes typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state document describing FRIDAY, a JARVIS-inspired AI assistant with a modular Python backend (LLM brain, speech pipeline, memory, automation) and a futuristic React frontend. Tracks schema version, architectural notes, known issues, image requirements, and existing implemented features.
